title: Namecheap Advanced DNS — zelaznogrihay.com pointing to GitHub Pages
html:
Namecheap Advanced-DNS panel for zelaznogrihay.com — four A records to GitHub Pages IPs (185.199.108-111.153) plus CNAME www → yg4president.github.io. Standard GH-Pages custom-domain setup. The vault's namesake domain.

github pages · zelaznogrihay com
